div.style: color: #24292e; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6;

h2.style: color: #0077b6; font-size: 18px; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 20px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 1px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding-left: 15px;

h3.style: color: #0077b6; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 8px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px;

span.style: background: #f6f8fa; border: 1px solid #e1e4e8; color: #24292e; font-size: 11px; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: 500; display: inline-block;
